cards.prompt: async method runs synchronously up to first await: same thread as caller?
cards.code: using System; using System.Threading; using System.Threading.Tasks; int caller = Thread.CurrentThread.ManagedThreadId; async Task<int> Work(){ Console.Write(Thread.CurrentThread.ManagedThreadId==caller?"same":"diff"); await Task.Delay(10); return 42; } await Work();

cards.prompt: start both tasks then WhenAll -> concurrent ~1x (not 2x)
cards.code: using System; using System.Diagnostics; using System.Threading.Tasks; async Task<int> Slow(int ms,int v){ await Task.Delay(ms); return v; } var sw=Stopwatch.StartNew(); var a=Slow(100,1); var b=Slow(100,2); await Task.WhenAll(a,b); Console.Write(sw.ElapsedMilliseconds < 160 ? "1x" : "2x");

cards.prompt: async completes synchronously when no incomplete awaitable: IsCompleted True, Result 7
cards.code: using System; using System.Threading.Tasks; async Task<int> Fast(){ await Task.CompletedTask; return 7; } var t = Fast(); Console.WriteLine($"{t.IsCompleted} {t.Result}");
